name: auth-presentations
description: Static HTML presentations for teaching authentication and authorization.

scripts.bootstrap: sfw npm exec --yes --package npm@11.11.1 -- npm install
scripts.review:marked: sfw npm view marked@17.0.6 version time dependencies peerDependencies engines license dist.integrity --json
scripts.review:prettier: sfw npm view prettier@3.8.3 version time dependencies peerDependencies engines license dist.integrity --json
scripts.review:serve: sfw npm view serve@14.2.6 version time dependencies peerDependencies engines license dist.integrity --json
